articles.title: Red Sox beat the Rockies 5-2 behind Sonny Gray’s 11 strikeouts
articles.description:
Gray (9-1) allowed a run on six hits with three walks in seven innings. The right-hander's 11 strikeouts were a season high and he matched his season high with 93 pitches — 65 for strikes.

The post Red Sox beat the Rockies 5-2 behind Sonny Gray’s 11 strikeouts appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Celtics take Houston forward Chris Cenac Jr. at No. 27
articles.description:
"He's just a good young player. Energetic, plays hard, athletic, long. Fits a position of need, some things we were a little short on," Brad Stevens said.

articles.title: Brockton’s A.J. Dybantsa becomes first Mass. player since Patrick Ewing to go No. 1 in NBA Draft
